    <section class="wp-editor">
  <div class="entry-content">
    
<h1 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center mb-3 h2" id="h-newport-healthcare">Newport Healthcare</h1>



<p class="has-text-align-center intro text-left text-md-center">In the face of multiple challenges impacting their resilience and well-being, children, teens, and young adults need the highest-quality, most effective mental healthcare available. Newport Healthcare is answering that call with industry-leading treatment that’s transforming the lives of young people and families across the country.</p>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity is-style-default"/>



<div style="height:15px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<div class="wp-block-group intro2 is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center" id="h-the-answer-to-today-s-mental-health-crisis">The Answer to Today’s Mental Health Crisis</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center text-left text-md-center">The foundation of our unparalleled care is our family-centered approach, which utilizes the Attachment-Based Family Therapy model and yields proven success, as evidenced by our outstanding patient outcomes. Newport Healthcare offers a full continuum of care at locations nationwide, and partners with major insurers so families can have access to excellent care that’s also affordable.</p>
</div>


<div class="wp-block-wrap wp-block-wide-wrap">
<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">
<div class="wp-block-columns has-1-columns-md-down has-intro-margins is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column pl-md-5 pr-md-5 pl-lg-0 is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow"><figure id="nh-header-image-block_00b6df24f8635b6dc4c7260329d4c0aa" class="wp-block-image wp-block-image__nh-header-image  wp-block-image__brand-logo">
  <h2>
    <a href="http://newportacademy.com/?utm_source=newport_healthcare&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=homepage&utm_content=na_logo" target="_blank">
      <img decoding="async" width="256" height="56" src="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/NA_Crest_Royal_Blue-01.png" class="attachment-full size-full" alt="Newport Academy - Child & Teen Treatment Center" />
    </a>
  </h2>
</figure>



<p class="pr-lg-2 pr-xl-5">Newport Academy is the leading <a href="https://www.newportacademy.com" class="link">mental health treatment center</a> for children ages 7–11 and teens ages 12–18, healing mental health issues, such as depression and anxiety, that cause maladaptive behaviors like problem substance use, disordered eating, self-harm, and other trauma-related behavioral concerns.</p>



<a class="secondary mt-auto" href="http://newportacademy.com/?utm_source=newport_healthcare&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=homepage&utm_content=1st_cta" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Learn more</a>



<p></p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column pl-md-5 pr-md-5 pl-lg-0 is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow"><figure id="nh-header-image-block_ff111390b31a51932dc7039f59e710ca" class="wp-block-image wp-block-image__nh-header-image  wp-block-image__brand-logo">
  <h2>
    <a href="https://newportinstitute.com/?utm_source=newport_healthcare&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=homepage&utm_content=ni_logo" target="_blank">
      <img decoding="async" width="261" height="56" src="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/NI_Left_Justified_Logo_Logo-01.png" class="attachment-full size-full" alt="Newport Institute - Young Adult Treatment Center" />
    </a>
  </h2>
</figure>



<p class="pr-lg-2 pr-xl-5">Newport Institute is a series of behavioral <a href="https://www.newportinstitute.com" class="link">healthcare programs for young adults</a> ages 18–35 who are struggling with mental health and/or co-occurring disorders, such as trauma, anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, eating disorders, substance use disorder, and self-harm.</p>



<a class="secondary mt-auto" href="https://newportinstitute.com/?utm_source=newport_healthcare&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=homepage&utm_content=2nd_cta" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Learn more</a>



<p></p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column pl-md-5 pr-md-5 p-lg-0 is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow"><figure id="nh-header-image-block_4f07a0dbddfcbcbf6a0d29ab02af7445" class="wp-block-image wp-block-image__nh-header-image  wp-block-image__brand-logo">
  <h2>
    
      <img decoding="async" width="320" height="70" src="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/PC-Logo-Color-RGB.png" class="attachment-full size-full" alt="Center for Families - Outpatient Services for Teens in PA" />
    
  </h2>
</figure>



<p class="pr-lg-2 pr-xl-5">PrairieCare offers psychiatric services in Minnesota for all ages, including an inpatient psychiatric hospital, <a href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/programs/residential/" class="link">residential treatment</a>, outpatient programs, and clinic services. PrairieCare has locations across the Twin Cities metro area, Mankato, and Rochester.</p>



<a class="secondary mt-auto" href="https://prairie-care.com/?utm_source=newport_healthcare&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=homepage&utm_content=3rd_cta" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Learn more</a>
</div>

</div>

<p class="has-text-align-center">We work with a wide range of insurance companies to help young people and families access, affordable, high-quality care.</p>

<p>Newport Healthcare’s integrated, multidisciplinary model brings together a range of clinical and medical expertise that is unparalleled in the behavioral health industry. By combining their talents and areas of specialization—medical, psychiatric, clinical, experiential, and life skills/academic—our treatment experts create transformative care experiences with long-lasting impacts.</p>

Newport Healthcare | Behavioral Healthcare Services 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
Behavioral Healthcare for Teens, Young Adults, and Their Families

 866-926-7701

 Contact us

 Search for: 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 Get Started 

 
 
 Paying for Care

 About Us 

 
 
 Our Mission & History

 Userway 

 Contact Us 

 866-926-7701 '>Call 866-926-7701 

 LinkedIn 

 Facebook 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 Search for: 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

Newport Healthcare

In the face of multiple challenges impacting their resilience and well-being, children, teens, and young adults need the highest-quality, most effective mental healthcare available. Newport Healthcare is answering that call with industry-leading treatment that’s transforming the lives of young people and families across the country.

 

The Answer to Today’s Mental Health Crisis

The foundation of our unparalleled care is our family-centered approach, which utilizes the Attachment-Based Family Therapy model and yields proven success, as evidenced by our outstanding patient outcomes. Newport Healthcare offers a full continuum of care at locations nationwide, and partners with major insurers so families can have access to excellent care that’s also affordable.

 
 

 
 
 
 

 

Newport Academy is the leading mental health treatment center for children ages 7–11 and teens ages 12–18, healing mental health issues, such as depression and anxiety, that cause maladaptive behaviors like problem substance use, disordered eating, self-harm, and other trauma-related behavioral concerns.

 Learn more 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 

Newport Institute is a series of behavioral healthcare programs for young adults ages 18–35 who are struggling with mental health and/or co-occurring disorders, such as trauma, anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, eating disorders, substance use disorder, and self-harm.

 Learn more 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 

PrairieCare offers psychiatric services in Minnesota for all ages, including an inpatient psychiatric hospital, residential treatment , outpatient programs, and clinic services. PrairieCare has locations across the Twin Cities metro area, Mankato, and Rochester.

 Learn more 

Insurance Accepted

We work with a wide range of insurance companies to help young people and families access, affordable, high-quality care.

 LEARN MORE 

Collaborative, Integrated Treatment

Newport Healthcare’s integrated, multidisciplinary model brings together a range of clinical and medical expertise that is unparalleled in the behavioral health industry. By combining their talents and areas of specialization—medical, psychiatric, clinical, experiential, and life skills/academic—our treatment experts create transformative care experiences with long-lasting impacts.

 

 

 

 Newport Healthcare has the largest number of clinical specializations that I have seen in the industry, which is a huge advantage for both staff and clients. 

 — Karla Molinero, MD, Medical Director 

 

 

Newport’s Clinical Model

We are dedicated to providing mental healthcare that creates lasting positive change for our clients. To that end, we rigorously collect and analyze patient data that informs our tailored treatment plans, while raising standards industrywide.

 Learn more 

Accreditation, Licensing, & Affiliations

Our innovative approach to mental healthcare earns accolades from press around the world, and our dedication to our client success has helped our Newport Academy and Newport Institute programs achieve accreditation from The Joint Commission, exceed licensing standards of care, and nurture affiliations with the following:

 
 

 The Joint Commission 
 

 
 

 The Trevor Project 
 

 
 

 National Association of Addiction Treatment Providers 
 

 
 

 AHIP 
 

 
 

 National Alliance on Mental Illness 
 

 
 

 National Association of Behavioral Healthcare 
 

 

 View all 

 
 Newport Healthcare Announces Promotion of Kristin Wilson, MA, LPC, CCTP-II, to Chief Growth & Experience Officer 

 March 6, 2026 
 

Latest News

 
 February 25, 2026 

 Newport Healthcare Recognizes National Eating Disorders Awareness Week by Collaborating with Field’s Top Professional Associations 
 
 
An accomplished child, adolescent, and adult psychiatrist, Dr. Hadzic brings a wealth of clinical expertise and a deep commitment to compassionate, patient-centered care.

 
 Read More 

 
 January 30, 2026 

 Newport Healthcare Appoints Brent Nelson, MD, to Chief Innovation & Optimization Officer 
 
 
An accomplished child, adolescent, and adult psychiatrist, Dr. Hadzic brings a wealth of clinical expertise and a deep commitment to compassionate, patient-centered care.

 
 Read More 

 
 October 21, 2025 

 Newport Healthcare Thought Leadership Featured at American Academy of Child & Adolescent Psychiatry Annual Meeting 
 
 
Newport thought leaders present at the 2025 Annual Meeting of the American Academy of Child & Adolescent Psychiatry in Chicago.

 
 Read More 

 
 March 27, 2025 

 Newport Healthcare Releases 2024 Outcomes Report Highlighting Significant Patient Improvements in Mental Health Treatment 
 
 
Newport Healthcare has released its 2024 outcomes report showing significant improvements in patient anxiety, depression, well-being, family attachment, and more.

 
 Read More 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
Interested in joining Newport Healthcare?

 
Learn more about our current availabilities on our Careers page.

      <!-- wp:columns -->
<div class="wp-block-columns"><!-- wp:column -->
<div class="wp-block-column"><!-- wp:heading {"textAlign":"center"} -->
<h2 class="has-text-align-center"><a href="https://newporthealthcare.es/careers/" class="link">Careers</a></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Interested in joining Newport Healthcare? Learn more about our current avalabilities on our careers page.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><a class="link secondary" href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/careers/">Learn More</a></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph --></div>
<!-- /wp:column -->

<!-- wp:column -->
<div class="wp-block-column"><!-- wp:heading {"textAlign":"center"} -->
<h2 class="has-text-align-center"><a href="https://newporthealthcare.es/careers/" class="link">Programs</a></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Our behavioral healthcare services are dedicated to treating teens, young adults, and families who are struggling with depression, anxiety, and trauma-related issues.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><a class="link secondary" href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/programs/">Learn More</a></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph --></div>
<!-- /wp:column -->

<!-- wp:column -->
<div class="wp-block-column"><!-- wp:heading {"textAlign":"center"} -->
<h2 class="has-text-align-center"><a href="https://newporthealthcare.es/healthcare-outcomes/" class="link">Outcomes</a></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>We are dedicated to mental health care that provides lasting care for our clients. We work rigorously collect and analyze client progress, informing our tailored treatment plans.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><a class="link secondary" href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/healthcare-outcomes/">Learn More</a></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph --></div>
<!-- /wp:column --></div>
<!-- /wp:columns -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<div class="wp-block-columns"><!-- wp:column -->
<div class="wp-block-column"><!-- wp:heading {"textAlign":"center"} -->
<h2 class="has-text-align-center"><a href="https://newporthealthcare.es/careers/" class="link">Careers</a></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Interested in joining Newport Healthcare? Learn more about our current avalabilities on our careers page.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><a class="link secondary" href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/careers/">Learn More</a></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph --></div>
<!-- /wp:column -->

<!-- wp:column -->
<div class="wp-block-column"><!-- wp:heading {"textAlign":"center"} -->
<h2 class="has-text-align-center"><a href="https://newporthealthcare.es/careers/" class="link">Programs</a></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Our behavioral healthcare services are dedicated to treating teens, young adults, and families who are struggling with depression, anxiety, and trauma-related issues.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><a class="link secondary" href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/programs/">Learn More</a></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph --></div>
<!-- /wp:column -->

<!-- wp:column -->
<div class="wp-block-column"><!-- wp:heading {"textAlign":"center"} -->
<h2 class="has-text-align-center"><a href="https://newporthealthcare.es/healthcare-outcomes/" class="link">Outcomes</a></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>We are dedicated to mental health care that provides lasting care for our clients. We work rigorously collect and analyze client progress, informing our tailored treatment plans.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><a class="link secondary" href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/healthcare-outcomes/">Learn More</a></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph --></div>
<!-- /wp:column --></div>
<!-- /wp:columns -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>

@media (max-width: 475px) {
    .page-header {
        max-width: 100%!important;
	}
}

/* BOF WP 6.6 Divi conflict fix */
:root :where(a:where(:not(.wp-block-navigation))),:root :where(a:where(:not(.wp-element-button))) {text-decoration: initial !important;}

/* fix text box issue JS */
.our-history-text-box {
   max-width: 860px!important;
    margin-left: 220px!important;
}

/* grey dots in blue sections JS 3-21-24 */
.bluecolumngreydots::after {
    background: url(https://www.newporthealthcare.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/line.png);
    min-height: 110px;
    content: " ";
    display: block;
    max-width: 2px;
    margin-top: -133px;
}

/* grey dots in blue sections JS 3-21-24 */
.bluecolumngreydotslower::after {
    background: url(https://www.newporthealthcare.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/linebigger.png);
    min-height: 210px;
    content: " ";
    display: block;
    max-width: 2px;
    margin-top: -283px;
}
.bluecolumngreydotslower .vc_column-inner {
min-height:340px;
}

/* Hide newsletterpopup 10-27-23 JS */
.newsletter {
display: none!important;
}

.fsnewiconfix {
    padding-left: 30px;
    padding-right: 30px;
    margin-right: 20px!important;
    margin-left: 20px!important;
}


/* END */


.media-link {
	font-size:22px;
	font-family: 'Nunito Sans',sans-serif;
	font-weight: 700;
}

.media-link:hover {
	text-decoration: underline;
}

/* James Picture Spacing Fix 3-1-23 */
@media (max-width: 767.98px){
.page-id-7912 .page-header.hero-static figure {
    margin-bottom: 0px!important;
}
	.page-id-7912 .wp-image-1037 {
display: none;
	}
}

/* End - James Picture Spacing Fix 3-1-23 */

/* Menu Updates */
@media (max-width: 1023px){
	.navbar-toggler {
		margin-right:15px;
	}
	.sub-menu a {
		font-size:14px!important;
		padding-top:10px;
		padding-bottom:10px;
	}
	.search-form {
		height:50px;
	}
	.search-form input {
			font-size:16px!important;
	}
}

/* Notification Bar Pop Up */
#popmake-51174 {
	padding:0px;
}

#popmake-51174 .pum-content p {
	color: #ffffff;
	text-decoration: none;
	max-width: 100%;
	margin: auto;
	font-weight: 400;
}

	color: #ffffff;
	text-decoration: none;
	font-weight: 400;
	width: 100vw;
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 10px;
	box-sizing:border-box;
}

/** Professional Referrals - Know Your Programs - RD 11172023 */

.know-programs {
    flex-direction: column;
}

/** Style updates - RD 11202023 */

	body.careers .wp-editor .entry-content>.wp-block-wrap.wp-block-wide-wrap>.nh-expla-icon-box .wp-block-column.has-icon {
	margin-bottom: 120px!important;

	}
}

	margin-top: 15px!important;
	}

}

 Programs 

 

 

Our behavioral healthcare services are dedicated to treating teens, young adults, and families who are struggling with depression, anxiety, and trauma-related issues.

We are dedicated to mental health care that provides lasting care for our clients. We work rigorously collect and analyze client progress, informing our tailored treatment plans.

<h1 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center h2" id="h-the-nation-s-preeminent-mental-health-provider-for-children-teens-and-young-adults">The Nation’s Preeminent Mental Health Provider for Children, Teens, and Young Adults </h1>


<div class="wp-block-wrap wp-block-wide-wrap">
<div class="wp-block-group alignwide nh-text-media-box dotted-01 has-light-background-color has-background is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-child-amp-teen-mental-health-program">Child & Teen Mental Health Program</h2>



<p><strong><a href="http://newportacademy.com/?utm_source=newport_healthcare&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=programs&utm_content=text_cta" target="_blank" aria-label=" (opens in a new tab)" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="link">Newport Academy</a></strong> opened its first residential treatment facility in 2008 and quickly became a national leader within the treatment industry. At Newport Academy, we bring teens from self-destruction to self-esteem by treating the underlying causes of high-risk behavior in our specialized mental health programs. </p>



<p>We treat children ages 7–11 and teens ages 12–18 who are struggling with depression, anxiety, obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), trauma/PTSD, eating disorders, and problem substance use. We create individualized, multidisciplinary treatment plans designed by treatment specialists who are the best in their respective fields. Through our clinical expertise and integrated care, we help clients and their families find sustainable healing.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-young-adult-mental-health-program">Young Adult Mental Health Program</h2>



<p>In 2019, we expanded Newport’s renowned adolescent clinical model to treat young adults struggling with the pressures of present-day society. <strong><a aria-label=" (opens in a new tab)" href="https://newportinstitute.com/?utm_source=newport_healthcare&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=programs&utm_content=text_cta" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="link">Newport Institute’s</a></strong> programming helps bring young adults from self-destruction to self-esteem by treating the underlying causes of high-risk behaviors.</p>



<p>We treat young adults ages 18–35 who are struggling with depression, anxiety, obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), PTSD/trauma, other mood disorders, substance use disorder, and eating disorders.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-a-healing-center-for-families">A Healing Center for Families</h2>



<p><strong><a aria-label=" (opens in a new tab)" href="https://www.centerforfamilies.com/programs/outpatient-services/?utm_source=newport_healthcare&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=programs&utm_content=cff_txt" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="link">Center for Families</a></strong> provides treatment for adolescents struggling with mental health, substance use, and disordered eating, as well as education for families in parent support groups. Led by licensed clinicians, our programming and support groups offer adolescents and their parents ways to build the foundation for successful recovery, by learning and practicing healthy coping skills and reestablishing trust and communication within the family system.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-comprehensive-psychiatric-care-in-minnesota">Comprehensive Psychiatric Care in Minnesota</h2>



<p>PrairieCare, part of the Newport Healthcare family of programs, offers psychiatric services in Minnesota for all ages, including free mental health screenings, clinic services, an inpatient psychiatric hospital, intensive outpatient and partial hospitalization programs, and <a href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/programs/residential/" class="link">residential treatment program</a>. PrairieCare has locations across the Twin Cities metro area and in Mankato and Rochester.</p>



<p>PrairieCare’s full continuum of care is designed to allow individuals to access various levels of care depending on their needs. Our dedicated team of mental health professionals will guide you in accessing the tailored treatment you need and walk alongside you throughout the recovery process.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://prairie-care.com/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">LEARN MORE</a></div>
</div>



<p></p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>
</div>


<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center" id="h-our-levels-of-care">Our Levels of Care</h2>


<div class="wp-block-wrap wp-block-wide-wrap">
<div class="wp-block-group alignwide nh-expla-icon-box is-bordered is-full-sm-down dotted-04 has-light-background-color has-background is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">

<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-large is-style-default"><img decoding="async" width="129" height="129" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20129%20129'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="" class="wp-image-622" data-lazy-src="/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/olc-residential.png"/><noscript><img decoding="async" width="129" height="129" src="/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/olc-residential.png" alt="" class="wp-image-622"/></noscript></figure>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center is-small" id="h-residential-treatment">Residential Treatment </h3>



<p>Our residential behavioral health services are designed to help children, teens, and young adults heal underlying trauma, build healthy coping skills, and develop self-esteem and self-acceptance. Our residential treatment provides compassionate, evidence-based care in a supportive healing environment. <a href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/programs/residential/" class="link">Read more.</a></p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column has-icon fsnewiconfix is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-large is-style-default"><img decoding="async" width="129" height="129" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20129%20129'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="" class="wp-image-623" data-lazy-src="/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/olc-php.png"/><noscript><img decoding="async" width="129" height="129" src="/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/olc-php.png" alt="" class="wp-image-623"/></noscript></figure>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center is-small" id="h-partial-hospitalization-program-php">Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP)</h3>



<p>Our Partial Hospitalization Program offers an all-day, Monday-Friday, on-location treatment plan, including 4–5 hours of clinical sessions per day. Clients continues to live at home during treatment while receiving the support and structure they need to thrive. <a href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/programs/partial-hospitalization/" class="link">Learn more.</a></p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column has-icon fsnewiconfix is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-large is-style-default"><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20125%20125'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="" class="wp-image-624" data-lazy-src="/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/olc-out.png"/><noscript><img decoding="async" width="125" height="125" src="/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/olc-out.png" alt="" class="wp-image-624"/></noscript></figure>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center is-small" id="h-intensive-outpatient-program-iop">Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP)</h3>



<p>Our IOP programs treat young people on site or virtually, three to five afternoons a week for 3–4 hours per day. During the day, clients attend school and other daily activities; in the afternoons, they receive evidence-based clinical support. <a href="https://www.newporthealthcare.com/programs/intensive-outpatient/" class="link">Find out more.</a></p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-our-team-of-experts">Our Team of Experts</h2>



<p>The <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Newport_Academy_and_Newport_Institute" class="link">Newport Healthcare</a> team includes psychiatrists, therapists, registered nurses, registered dietitians, teachers, all dedicated to making a difference in the lives of young people and families.</p>
</div>



<p></p>
</div>

Mental Health Programs for Children, Teens, Young Adults | Newport Healthcare

 866-926-7701 '>Call 866-926-7701

 Search for: 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 

 Home / Our Programs 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Our Programs

Evidence-based care

for young people and families.

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

The Nation’s Preeminent Mental Health Provider for Children, Teens, and Young Adults 

 

Child & Teen Mental Health Program

 Newport Academy opened its first residential treatment facility in 2008 and quickly became a national leader within the treatment industry. At Newport Academy, we bring teens from self-destruction to self-esteem by treating the underlying causes of high-risk behavior in our specialized mental health programs. 

We treat children ages 7–11 and teens ages 12–18 who are struggling with depression, anxiety, obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), trauma/PTSD, eating disorders, and problem substance use. We create individualized, multidisciplinary treatment plans designed by treatment specialists who are the best in their respective fields. Through our clinical expertise and integrated care, we help clients and their families find sustainable healing.

 LEARN MORE 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 

Young Adult Mental Health Program

In 2019, we expanded Newport’s renowned adolescent clinical model to treat young adults struggling with the pressures of present-day society. Newport Institute’s programming helps bring young adults from self-destruction to self-esteem by treating the underlying causes of high-risk behaviors.

We treat young adults ages 18–35 who are struggling with depression, anxiety, obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), PTSD/trauma, other mood disorders, substance use disorder, and eating disorders.

 LEARN MORE 

 

A Healing Center for Families

 Center for Families provides treatment for adolescents struggling with mental health, substance use, and disordered eating, as well as education for families in parent support groups. Led by licensed clinicians, our programming and support groups offer adolescents and their parents ways to build the foundation for successful recovery, by learning and practicing healthy coping skills and reestablishing trust and communication within the family system.

 LEARN MORE 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 

Comprehensive Psychiatric Care in Minnesota

PrairieCare, part of the Newport Healthcare family of programs, offers psychiatric services in Minnesota for all ages, including free mental health screenings, clinic services, an inpatient psychiatric hospital, intensive outpatient and partial hospitalization programs, and residential treatment program . PrairieCare has locations across the Twin Cities metro area and in Mankato and Rochester.

PrairieCare’s full continuum of care is designed to allow individuals to access various levels of care depending on their needs. Our dedicated team of mental health professionals will guide you in accessing the tailored treatment you need and walk alongside you throughout the recovery process.

 LEARN MORE 

Our Levels of Care

 

Residential Treatment 

Our residential behavioral health services are designed to help children, teens, and young adults heal underlying trauma, build healthy coping skills, and develop self-esteem and self-acceptance. Our residential treatment provides compassionate, evidence-based care in a supportive healing environment. Read more. 

 

Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP)

Our Partial Hospitalization Program offers an all-day, Monday-Friday, on-location treatment plan, including 4–5 hours of clinical sessions per day. Clients continues to live at home during treatment while receiving the support and structure they need to thrive. Learn more. 

 

Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP)

Our IOP programs treat young people on site or virtually, three to five afternoons a week for 3–4 hours per day. During the day, clients attend school and other daily activities; in the afternoons, they receive evidence-based clinical support. Find out more. 

Our Team of Experts

The Newport Healthcare team includes psychiatrists, therapists, registered nurses, registered dietitians, teachers, all dedicated to making a difference in the lives of young people and families.

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Insurance Accepted

We work with a wide range of insurance companies to help young people and families access, affordable, high-quality care.

 LEARN MORE 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
Interested in joining Newport Healthcare?

 
Learn more about our current availabilities on our Careers page.
